response.justification: The candidate lacks critical required qualifications: no evidence of C programming for UNIX embedded systems, no experience with Linux kernel modification, no exposure to embedded networking or LAN-switch security technologies (e.g., MACsec, 802.1X), and no Japanese language proficiency — all of which are non-negotiable for this role.
strengths: Strong full-stack experience across multiple languages and platforms
Demonstrated ability to build and maintain complex systems (e.g., GISCollective, CI/CD infrastructure)
Active contributor to open source and technical education initiatives
concerns: No C programming experience in embedded or UNIX environments
No demonstrated knowledge of embedded networking, switch firmware, or security protocols like MACsec or 802.1X
No Japanese language proficiency — a hard requirement for the role

key_factors.factor: No Linux kernel or switch chip exposure
